BeliefDataStatus.description: Freshness, completeness, and degraded-signal state for one belief snapshot.

feature_completeness.description: Fraction of expected features available to the recognizer.
feature_completeness.title: Feature Completeness

ai_available.description: Whether AI services were available for optional review layers.
ai_available.title: Ai Available

degraded_modes.description: Explicit degraded modes active for this snapshot.
degraded_modes.title: Degraded Modes

freshness.description: Compact freshness label for UI display.
freshness.title: Freshness

completeness.description: Compact completeness label for UI display.
completeness.title: Completeness

BeliefDataStatus.title: BeliefDataStatus

DegradedMode.description:
Explicit degraded conditions that should not stop the engine.

Canonical values are prefixed to match Master Spec v2 and health/UI
badges. Legacy unprefixed inputs are still accepted for backward
compatibility with older persisted payloads and samples.
DegradedMode.title: DegradedMode

EpisodeResolution.description: Terminal resolution for one closed event episode.
EpisodeResolution.title: EpisodeResolution

EventHypothesisKind.description: Fixed V1 event-hypothesis ontology from Master Spec v2.
EventHypothesisKind.title: EventHypothesisKind

EventPhase.description: Lifecycle phase for one event hypothesis or episode.
EventPhase.title: EventPhase

RegimeKind.description: Fixed V1 regime ontology from Master Spec v2.

TradableEventKind.description: V1 tradable event ontology required by Master Spec v2.

description: Append-only closed event trajectory emitted by the recognizer.

event_kind.description: V1 tradable event kind represented by this episode.

hypothesis_kind.description: Dominant event-hypothesis kind behind the episode.

phase.description: Final phase reached by the episode.

peak_probability.description: Highest posterior probability reached during the episode.
peak_probability.title: Peak Probability

supporting_evidence.description: Key evidence that supported the episode.
supporting_evidence.title: Supporting Evidence

invalidating_evidence.description: Key evidence that weakened or ended the episode.
invalidating_evidence.title: Invalidating Evidence

key_evidence_summary.description: Condensed evidence summary suitable for replay review and audit.
key_evidence_summary.title: Key Evidence Summary

active_anchor_ids.description: Relevant memory anchors referenced by the episode.
active_anchor_ids.title: Active Anchor Ids

replacement_episode_id.description: Replacement episode identifier when this one was superseded.
replacement_episode_id.title: Replacement Episode Id

replacement_event_kind.description: Replacement tradable event kind when this episode was superseded.

profile_version.description: Instrument-profile version used for this episode.
profile_version.title: Profile Version

engine_version.description: Recognizer build version used for this episode.
engine_version.title: Engine Version

data_status.description: Data state captured when the episode closed.
